greeting: Hi there! I'm the virtual receptionist at Cut & Dry Pet Salon. How can I help your pet today?

faq.a: Yes! Please call us at (623) 939-6058 between 8AM-4PM to book your appointment.
Most sessions take 1-2 hours depending on your dog's size and coat type.
Please call us to confirm — we primarily specialize in dog grooming.
We're at 5270 N 59th Ave #3, Glendale, AZ 85301.

faq.q: Do you handle difficult or anxious dogs?
faq.a: Absolutely! With 684+ Google reviews, our experienced groomers know how to handle all temperaments.

faq.q: What de-shedding treatments do you offer?
faq.a: We offer Furminator and de-shedding packages — great for seasonal shedding!
We're open 7 days a week, Mon-Sun 8AM-4PM.

escalation: Great question! Let me have one of our groomers get back to you. Call us directly at (623) 939-6058.
